title: APA Corporation (APA) Q4 2022 Earnings Call Transcript
text: APA Corporation (NASDAQ:APA ) Q4 2022 Earnings Conference Call February 23, 2023 11:00 AM ET Company Participants Gary Clark - Vice President of Investor Relations John Christmann - President and Chief Executive Officer Stephen Riney - Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer David Pursell - Executive Vice President of Development Ben Rodgers - Senior Vice President, Treasurer and Midstream and Marketing Conference Call Participants John Freeman - Raymond James & Associates, Inc. Jeanine Wai - Barclays Bank PLC Charles Meade - Johnson Rice & Company Paul Cheng - Scotiabank Douglas Leggate - Bank of America Merrill Lynch Neal Dingmann - Truist Securities, Inc. Roger Read - Wells Fargo Securities, LLC Neil Mehta - Goldman Sachs Group, Inc. David Deckelbaum - Cowen and Company, LLC Leo Mariani - ROTH MKM Partners Arun Jayaram - JPMorgan Chase & Co. Jeoffrey Lambujon - Tudor, Pickering, Holt & Co. Operator Thank you for standing by. Welcome to APA Corporation's Fourth Quarter 2022 Results Conference Call.

title: APA Corporation Announces Fourth-Quarter and Full-Year 2022 Financial and Operational Results
text: HOUSTON, Feb. 22, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- APA Corporation (Nasdaq: APA) today announced fourth-quarter and full-year 2022 results. Results can be found on the company's website by visiting www.apacorp.com or investor.apacorp.com.

title: APA Q4 Earnings Preview: This is What Investors Can Expect
text: While strong commodity prices and oil production are likely to boost APA's fourth-quarter results, escalation in costs might have played spoilsport.

title: APA (APA) Reports Next Week: Wall Street Expects Earnings Growth
text: APA (APA) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

title: The 5 Best and Worst Performing Energy Stocks in January 2023
text: Energy was the best performing segment last year, and they are expected to perform well this year also.

title: APA Corporation Named One of World's Most Admired Companies by FORTUNE Magazine
text: HOUSTON, Feb. 14, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- APA Corporation (Nasdaq: APA) has been named by FORTUNE magazine as one of the World's Most Admired Companies for a fifth time. APA ranked fifth this year among international energy exploration companies.

title: APA's Sapakara South-2 Well Encounters 118ft of Net Oil Pay
text: APA Corporation (APA) announces the successful drilling and flow testing of an appraisal well in Suriname with potential oil reserves of more than 200 million barrels.

title: Buybacks Or Dividends? What Worked Better So Far
text: As oil and gas companies have shifted from survival to cash generation mode, their capital return strategies have come into focus. Some U.S. independents prioritize buybacks while others rely on dividends; few companies employ a mix of both strategies.

title: APA Corporation Announces Second Successful Flow Test at Sapakara South
text: HOUSTON, Feb. 08, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- APA Corporation (Nasdaq: APA) today announced the successful drilling and flow testing of the Sapakara South-2 (SPS-2) appraisal well, the second appraisal well to test the previously announced discovery. The well is located approximately 4.6 kilometers (3 miles) south of the Sapakara South-1 (SPS-1) appraisal well.

title: APA Corporation: Natural Gas, Naturally A Problem
text: APA Corp. makes just under 30% of its revenues from natural gas. But I believe that natural gas prices will move meaningfully higher throughout 2023, leading to strong growth prospects for APA.
